findings.problem: The root repository README still described Flow as split into only two workspaces and treated root-level items as the only shared assets, which no longer matched the roadmap or the actual package layout. `shared/` is an active packaged surface (`flow-ipc`).
findings.evidence: `README.md` said the repo was split into `backend/` and `frontend/` only. `docs/roadmap/01-current-state.md` describes `backend/`, `frontend/`, and `shared/` as the current layout. `shared/pyproject.toml` defines the shipped `flow-ipc` package.
findings.recommendation: Update `README.md` so the top-level repository layout matches the current truth surface: `shared/` should be described as an active workspace, while `docs/`, `openspec/`, and `.agent/` remain non-package root assets.
